notes: v1.14.51 - HEX ENTER-BUTTON IDLE GLOW per PHANTOM_HEX_GLOW_HANDOFF. The idle Spectral Iris read as a ghost on the dark bg (#04060a) and didn't announce itself as the primary action; this is a contrast/glow bump on the IDLE state only — charge/hold behavior and the cyan->teal fill ramp are untouched. Deltas: (1) idle ring stroke #1a2330 -> #28e0ff @ stroke-opacity 0.55, width 1.8 (the static SVG aperture circle; primary fix). (2) Soft radial HALO behind the hex via #boot .pe-stage::before (NOT a per-element drop-shadow filter — consistent with the locked packet-glow pattern): radial-gradient(circle, rgba(40,224,255,0.22) 0%, transparent 70%), ~1.6x the hex, centered, z-index:0 (below ring + text). (3) Breathing moved OFF the stage filter ONTO the halo only — @keyframes pe-haloBreathe opacity 0.6<->1.0, 2.8s ease-in-out; reduced-motion -> static opacity 0.8. (4) HOLD text #46566c -> rgba(220,245,255,0.92) + text-shadow 0 0 8px rgba(40,224,255,0.45) (CSS .pe-g AND the resetIdle() inline color, so the JS no longer overrides it gray; letter-spacing kept). (5) idle seam dividers -> rgba(40,224,255,0.12) via draw() (cyan @ opacity 0.12 when idle; charge ramp .3+c*.5 unchanged). Stacking added so the halo sits behind: svg z-index:1, .pe-clabel z-index:2, .pe-flash z-index:5. No overflow:hidden ancestor clips the halo. Gates: node --check 3/3 (JS touched: seam + HOLD color), <style> braces 2656/2656 (+1 pair from the halo rule, balanced), four stamps lockstep v1.14.51, cache bumped, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. DEVICE (John, iPhone, close+reopen to clear SW cache): idle hex now reads as the clear primary action, halo breathes (static under reduced-motion), HOLD legible at gloved arm's length, no blow-out vs the dark bg, globe/wordmark still dominant. STILL PENDING: the ?cal=1 node-calibration pass (drag the 21 mesh nodes onto their cities, COPY the JSON back to bake locked coords).
